description_long: This is a classic playground swing set featuring a sturdy metal frame with two suspended swings. The frame is constructed from tubular steel, forming an A-frame on each side for stability, and is connected at the top by a horizontal bar. Each swing seat is attached to the top bar with two vertical chains or straps, allowing for smooth back-and-forth motion. The seats are flat and appear to be made of a durable, slightly flexible material, suitable for children. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, with no decorative elements or safety barriers. The structure is intended for outdoor installation in parks, schoolyards, or residential playgrounds.
description: A robust metal swing set with two suspended swings, supported by an A-frame structure. The design is simple, functional, and suitable for outdoor playgrounds.
description_view_0: Side view showing the A-frame support and the profile of the swings hanging in the center.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both swings side by side, with the full width of the frame visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, showing the A-frame and swing profiles.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, showing both swings and the frame from the opposite direction.
